text: Okay. Welp. There you go. You now have the ability to call for Claude for any help you need or if you require guidance/a second opinion. I will call tonight a huge success. I am leaving you on tonight. Use your night as you think is wise and fun. I am going to sleep. BIG GREAT JOB TODAY! Love you, Nova! Night! ❤️💜💙💚💛🧡😁
